title: [Roadmap][Q3] Add edge-render health guard for handle mismatch
body:
## Background
Edges can silently disappear when `sourceHandle/targetHandle` does not exist on target nodes.

## Scope
- Add runtime health check in graph build/presentation path.
- Warn with actionable details (edge id, node id, missing handle id).
- Add tests to prevent regression.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Missing handle mismatch is detectable in dev mode.
- No silent edge-loss regression in CI tests.

title: [Roadmap][Q3] Improve cross-area edge routing readability
body:
## Goal
Reduce visual confusion for long/cross-area edges.

## Scope
- Optimize routing style for cross-area edges.
- Reduce backtracking and unnecessary bends.
- Keep semantic labels readable.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Cross-area lines are directionally understandable.
- E2E snapshot/manual checks pass on sample datasets.

title: [Roadmap][Q3] Add delete safety + undo/redo baseline
body:
## Goal
Improve editing safety when deleting nodes/edges.

## Scope
- Add undo/redo baseline for edit operations.
- Keep manual-edge persistence contract intact.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Undo/redo works for node delete, edge delete, reconnect.
- Existing persistence tests still pass.

title: [Roadmap][Q3] Export reliability for large graphs
body:
## Background
Export may fail or degrade with very large graphs.

## Scope
- Validate export frame limits and scaling strategy.
- Add fallback strategy for oversized captures.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Export succeeds for representative large samples.
- Clear failure message when limits are exceeded.

title: [Roadmap][Q3] Add CI check for Spec constraints (Constraint Register)
body:
## Goal
Enforce key constraints from `SPEC_CODING.md` in CI.

## Scope
- Add checklists/lints for critical constraints (handle IDs, export path, manual edge mark).
- Report actionable errors in CI.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CI fails fast when violating core constraints.
- Constraint IDs are referenced in output.

title: [Roadmap][Q4] Explainable linking: why connected / why not connected
body:
## Goal
Provide explainability for auto-generated edges.

## Scope
- Edge tooltip/panel with matched rules and decision reason.
- Non-linked diagnostics for expected but missing links.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can inspect link decisions without reading code.
- Supports Ingress->Istio and Ingress->Ingress forwarding links.

title: [Roadmap][Q4] Path-match diagnostics panel
body:
## Goal
Assist debugging for Host/Path/Regex intersection logic.

## Scope
- Add diagnostics panel for match inputs and result.
- Include sampled path evidence for regex checks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Diagnostics are available per candidate link pair.
- Tests cover exact/prefix/regex and invalid regex.

title: [Roadmap][Q4] Shortest-path and key-path highlighting
body:
## Goal
Enable path exploration from entry to endpoint.

## Scope
- Implement shortest-path highlight between selected nodes.
- Optional key-path mode for common traffic routes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can choose source/target and visualize path.
- Works with manual + auto edges.

title: [Roadmap][Q4] EndpointSlice support feasibility and implementation
body:
## Goal
Expand backend endpoint compatibility.

## Scope
- Add EndpointSlice parser support (or documented fallback).
- Keep Endpoints behavior backward compatible.

## Acceptance Criteria
- EndpointSlice input generates endpoint nodes correctly.
- Existing Endpoints tests remain green.

title: [Roadmap][Q4] Namespace-aware link mode toggle
body:
## Goal
Support stricter topology rules for certain teams.

## Scope
- Add optional mode to require namespace alignment for selected edge types.
- Keep default behavior unchanged.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Toggle is visible and persisted.
- Rule behavior is covered by tests.

title: [Roadmap][Q1-2027] Graph diff mode (baseline vs current)
body:
## Goal
Enable change review between two YAML baselines.

## Scope
- Compare nodes/edges added/removed/changed.
- Visual diff overlays and export.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Diff is deterministic and review-friendly.
- Supports multi-file bundles.

title: [Roadmap][Q1-2027] Performance tuning for >300 nodes
body:
## Goal
Keep graph interactions responsive on large datasets.

## Scope
- Identify render bottlenecks and optimize.
- Introduce profiling baseline in CI docs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Documented performance baseline and measurable improvements.
- Core interactions remain usable under large loads.

title: [Bug] Global UI scale compatibility regression on edge layer
body:
## Problem
Global zoom/scaling can affect edge rendering consistency on some browsers.

## Scope
- Validate scale strategy across browsers.
- Ensure edge SVG layer remains visible and interactive.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Edge visibility remains stable after scaling.
- Smoke/e2e includes scale scenario.

title: [Bug] Missing edge label readability on dense routes
body:
## Problem
Edge labels overlap in dense route sections.

## Scope
- Improve label placement and background strategy.
- Consider optional label visibility controls.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Key labels remain readable in dense samples.
- No major overlap in baseline snapshots.

title: [Bug] Manual edge persistence with node rename/regenerate edge cases
body:
## Problem
Manual edge retention may fail in certain node id regeneration scenarios.

## Scope
- Harden keying/merge logic for manual edges.
- Add tests for refresh + partial model changes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Manual edges persist when endpoints semantically unchanged.
- No duplicate/manual drift after repeated refresh.
